name: out-and-back
description: Up A->B then back B->A (start == end). The return-leg fix at lng 0.010 shares coordinates with the outbound fix at lng 0.010 but must report fraction 0.75, not 0.25. Returning to the start (== end) reads as 100% / arrived, NOT 0% / moving-away. windowAheadM is widened to 700 so the 556 m fix spacing stays inside the forward window; the 60 m BACK window is what stops the return matching the outbound.
